content:
# Recommendations → iter-042 plan

## Closest-to-completion / continue
- **Strand-(b) brick 1 sub-brick (2): semilinear restriction maps + `PresheafOfModules` assembly.**
  The per-section module atom (`homModuleOverGlobalSections`) is now in place. Next: for `V ⊆ U`, build
  `(I|_U ⟶ M|_U) → (I|_V ⟶ M|_V)` via `Scheme.Modules.pullback (incl:↑V⟶↑U)` applied to the morphism,
  transported `pullback incl (pullback U.ι I) ≅ pullback V.ι I` via `pullbackComp`; assemble into a
  `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` with **semilinear** restriction over `Γ(X,U)→Γ(X,V)` and presheaf
  functoriality. Reuse `homModuleOverGlobalSections` for the section modules (instantiate at `Y:=↑U`).
  The `pullbackComp` coherence bookkeeping on hom-objects is the bulk (≥1–2 iters). Then (3) sheaf
  condition, (4) functoriality in `M`, (5) `Additive`.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY — planner authors blueprint entries; review does not write prose)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = **10** `lean_aux` nodes, all this session's brick-1 helpers (Basic.lean:1006–1149), none with a blueprint block. All are foundations of `def:internalHom`:
- **`homModuleOverGlobalSections`** (1093) — `Module Γ(Y,⊤) (M⟶N)`. `\uses`: per-open `CommRing Γ(Y,U.unop)` via `inferInstanceAs`, ModuleCat `Linear`/`restrictScalars` API, `SheafOfModules.hom_ext`/`PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`. Suggested `def:homModuleOverGlobalSections`, used-by `def:internalHom`.
- **`linearOverGlobalSections`** (1136) — `Linear Γ(Y,⊤) Y.Modules`. `\uses{def:homModuleOverGlobalSections}` + `Linear.{smul_comp,comp_smul}` on `ModuleCat`. Suggested `def:linearOverGlobalSections`, used-by `def:internalHom`.
- Private helpers (6 + the smul-val def) — trivial atoms; either fold into the two definitions' prose or give one-line `lem:` stubs: `globalSectionRestrict` (1023) + `_one/_zero/_mul/_add` (ring-hom-ness of restriction) + `_naturality` (uniqueness of `Opens`-into-`⊤`); `restrictScalars_map_smul` (1059, semilinear-restriction compat); `internalHomSmulVal` (1070, the underlying presheaf-Hom of `r•φ`).
- `def:internalHom` block already exists with `\lean{…internalHom}` pointing at the unbuilt functor — leave unmarked until built.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign / do NOT anchor
- **`ext_finite_flat` (1.10, Basic.lean:~2712).** Blocked behind the entire strand-(b) infra (internal hom → `relExt` → base-change 1.8 → exchange 1.9 → close). Do NOT assign directly. Do NOT anchor `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` — that restates 1.10 (unsound), and an opaque def gives the 1.8/1.9 assembly no usable API (KB invariant, held since @018).
- **`internalHom` functor as a one-shot.** Confirmed a multi-iter from-scratch layer (loogle/grep @041). Do NOT dispatch "build the whole functor" in one lane — proceed sub-brick by sub-brick (above).

## Reusable patterns discovered (also in Knowledge Base)
- **Module over `Γ(Y,⊤)` on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets:** the structure sheaf is `RingCat`-valued (hides commutativity), so recover the per-open `CommRing` via `letI := inferInstanceAs (CommRing Γ(Y,U.unop))`; build the action section-wise (`r•φ ↦ ⟨internalHomSmulVal r φ⟩` scaling `φ.val.app U` by `r|_U`); close axioms by `SheafOfModules.hom_ext`→`PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`→section-level ModuleCat `smul` lemmas; naturality = semilinear-restriction compat `restrictScalars_map_smul` (via `restrictScalars.map_apply` + `.smul_def`) + `globalSectionRestrict_naturality` + `Linear.{comp,smul}`.

## Strategy note (convergence watch)
- Strand-(b) is a declared ~8–16-iter build; iter-041 is iter 1 of brick 1, and the functor alone is ≥3–4 iters. Sorry will stay at 1 through the infra phase — judge progress by brick completion, NOT sorry count. The "§1-strand-(a) as stopping point" option remains live in `TO_USER.md`; user steers via `USER_HINTS.md`. If brick-1 sub-brick (2) (`pullbackComp` on hom-objects) turns out to be a from-scratch coherence layer of its own, reconsider build-vs-anchor for the foundational construction or escalate scope to the user (per the @041 reversal tripwire).
